note: Web evidence was gathered in-chat with web.run; packet stores synthesis claims and URLs are cited in final response.

sources.claim: Code review should check design, functionality, complexity, tests, naming, comments, style, documentation, every line, and broader context.
sources.name: Google Engineering Practices - Code Review: What to look for

sources.claim: Secure development practices should reduce vulnerabilities, mitigate exploitation impact, and address root causes to prevent recurrence.
sources.name: NIST SSDF 1.1

sources.claim: Secure coding requires validation, access control, error handling/logging, data protection, file management, memory management, and general coding practices.
sources.name: OWASP Secure Coding Practices checklist
